_doc: Curated golden-query set for the rosetta MCP `routeros_search` surface. See src/eval/retrieval.ts for the runner. Each entry asserts what an agent SHOULD see when it asks this question. `expected_pages` lists page IDs that are acceptable as a 'correct' top-N hit (any match counts). `expected_classified` asserts the regex classifier's detection. Keep this set small and high-signal — quality over quantity. Add new entries when you fix a real bug, not speculatively.

queries.query: how do I set up a DHCP server
queries.notes: Bread-and-butter NL question. Page id 24805500 = DHCP.

queries.query: block traffic from a specific IP address
queries.notes: Any firewall-related page in top-5 is acceptable. Topic 'ip' is detected before 'firewall' — that's fine, both are present in the query.

queries.query: bridge vlan filtering on a switch
configure wireguard peer with preshared key
run a docker container on RouterOS
establish a BGP peer with my upstream
queries.notes: BGP page (328220), /routing/bgp ref (331612228), or Routing Protocol Overview (28606515).

queries.query: ospf area type stub
run a script every hour
reset device to factory defaults from routerboot
centrally manage wifi access points
queries.notes: CAPsMAN page, the family page, a CAPsMAN case study, or the WiFi parent page all reasonably answer.

queries.query: site-to-site IPsec tunnel between two routers
tag vlan on an ethernet interface
/ip/firewall/filter
queries.notes: Classifier MUST detect the path; command_node check skipped on slim DBs.

queries.query: /routing/bgp
/container
what changed in 7.22.1
queries.notes: Classifier captures the patch version when present. NOTE: a related real-bug — querying just '7.22' classifies as version='7.22' but the DB has changelogs only for '7.22.1' so related.changelogs is silently empty. See BACKLOG: 'Changelog version-rollup'.

queries.query: CCR2216 specs
hAP ax3 wifi performance
queries.notes: Classifier currently detects 'hAP' (the family) not 'hAP ax3' (the specific model). Tightening to 'hAP ax3' is a known classifier improvement — see Device AKA backlog item.

queries.query: firewall mangle action mark-connection
queries.notes: Multi-word firewall query. Top-3 should be firewall-related (any of mangle/filter/raw/nat pages).

queries.query: what does the disabled property do
queries.notes: Ambiguous — 'disabled' exists on dozens of pages. Classifier doesn't currently detect 'disabled' as a property name (no strong signal). Tracked as classifier improvement opportunity. This entry currently passes as a no-op; tighten when classifier learns common property names.
